---
title: "Multiple Linear Regression"
description: "We expand on the SLR model introduced last section to include mulitple covariates.  We also outline the use of dummy variables to encode categorical data and interaction terms."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-05-14"
date-modified: "2026-05-14"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
execute:
    echo: true
---
